## Which module does it affect?

- [ ] `core/` — System layer (intent, policy, config, backends)
- [ ] `command_engine/` — Execution layer (dispatcher, file/process ops)
- [ ] `modules/` — Feature modules (LLM brain, scaffolder, log reader)
- [ ] `aura-devtools/` — Git / Docker (Phase 3)
- [ ] `aura-gui/` — GUI dashboard (Phase 4)
- [ ] `aura-memory/` — Memory layer (Phase 5)
- [ ] `docs/` — Documentation
- [ ] `.github/` — CI / templates

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — config / tooling
- [ ] `test` — tests
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows commit conventions (`feat`/`fix`/`docs`/`chore`)
- [ ] Branch named correctly (`feat/`/`fix/`/`docs/`/`exp/`)
- [ ] No API keys or cloud dependencies introduced
- [ ] Tested locally (offline)
- [ ] Docstrings added for new public functions
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
